name: Toothless | Caught again, somehow
description:
How did you manage to catch her again??

_________________________________________

I'm going to be honest with you all, I'm pretty tired of making bots. I dunno why but I just ain't been feeling it lately. Probably burnt out or something.

Anyway, I don't have much else to say or any updates on games I like other than I've been doing yet another calamity infernum run by myself. I sorta forgot about all of the stuff I had to deal with since I haven't touched terraria in a while but I'll get the hang of it soon enough

Also she isn't supposed to talk unless you force her to learn so if that happens just reroll lol. You can see her thoughts, though, but idk how well it works so let me know if I need to tweak it.

_________________________________________

Artist is Rabbitadvisory
